latin: Fossor nocte per speluncam ambulabat cum strepitum audivit. 'serpens?' rogavit trepidans. 'eheu!' subito monstrum viride post eum sibilavit et — FRAGOR!
translation: The miner was walking through a cave at night when he heard a noise. 'A creeper?' he asked, trembling. 'Oh no!' Suddenly a green monster hissed behind him and — BOOM!
